seoTitle: Lake Bunga vs Lake Charm — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Bunga and Lake Charm. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Bunga vs Lake Charm: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Bunga and Lake Charm.
heading: Lake Bunga vs Lake Charm — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Bunga, Victoria and Lake Charm, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Bunga has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Lake Charm (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Bunga or Lake Charm safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Bunga has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Lake Charm scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Bunga scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Charm scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Bunga or Lake Charm?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Bunga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
